tasks.title: Install native next-slice queue commands
tasks.notes: Current implementation slice: add queue state, next/done/loop commands, protocol, and doctor coverage.
tasks.completed_details: Implemented native next-slice queue commands, strict completion gates, local jsonschema validation, and doctor coverage. Verified json parsing, bash syntax, bin/coding-anchor-next --json, bin/coding-anchor-loop --dry-run --max-slices 2, negative unreviewed closeout refusal, doctor pass receipt 20260626-163223-17604-doctor.txt, and independent reviewer follow-up reported no actionable issues.

tasks.title: Dogfood next-slice loop on one small packet improvement
tasks.notes: Use the queue to select and complete one safe packet-hardening task without Stephen saying next slice.
tasks.completed_details: Dogfooded the next-slice loop by promoting ca-next-002 with bin/coding-anchor-start, adding the missing start transition, adding dry-run and temp-queue smoke coverage, tightening whitespace evidence validation, verifying next/loop/doctor behavior, and receiving independent reviewer clearance with no actionable issues.

tasks.title: Evaluate Taskmaster or taskqueue integration as an optional adapter
tasks.notes: Inspect integration path only; do not install a third-party framework over the packet.
tasks.completed_details: Documented adapter recommendation in notes/adapter-recommendation-2026-06-26.md after current GitHub/source review. Recommendation: keep native queue primary; do not install Task Master, Taskqueue MCP, Agent Task Queue, GitHub Agentic Workflows, or broad autonomous-agent frameworks over the packet by default; add adapters only for real project needs. Verified no install occurred and doctor passed at receipt 20260626-164154-73463-doctor.txt.

tasks.title: Install concise agentic output and decision rules
tasks.notes: Add concise output protocol, agentic decision rule, agentic-check command, and doctor/doc wiring.
tasks.completed_details: Installed concise agentic output and decision protocols, added bin/coding-anchor-agentic-check, wired doctor and full boot protocol surfacing, enforced the one-active-task queue invariant in next/doctor/schema, verified agentic-check, shell syntax, queue conflict behavior, schema conflict behavior, and doctor pass receipt 20260626-165441-99302-doctor.txt. Independent reviewer follow-up reported no remaining actionable issues.
